title: Thamirabarani Lyrics Nedunchalai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thamirabarani
Singer(s): C.Sathya
Movie: Nedunchalai
Music: C.Sathya
Lyrics: Karthik Netha		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Thamirabarani neeril neendhi vandhaen
yen aavaam pooilaye
Aayiram kanava ne vedhachiputtu
kai veesi poravale
Karuppi kaattukulla molacha nella pola
morattu nejukulla mutti vandhu molacha
edhuku kuthavacha manasa pathavacha
kosuvam pola pinnavacha mudi
adiye perukaan muzhiye
adiye uruvaachurukke

Pathu pannirendu manivara naanum
kandavazhi thirinjaen
pottapulla iva paathutu ponaa
ottukulla adanjen

Otha thuni mattum pozhudhukum uduthi
ishtapadi kedandhaen
ottuthanni iva sirichittu ponaa
eight-u mura kulichen

Maruthaani ela pola
en manasa kasakura
arukaani azhagaathaan en
usura kudikkuraa
Raatina thooriya pola enna
adi yendi urula vitta

POllaachi sootu thachi
kankaachi paakayila
annaasi pazham pola
enna vetti thinna adiye

Sallipaya iva manasula neethaan
malli chediya vacha
otta kaasu enna urupidiyaaki
nenju kuzhyil vacha
adi podi unna paarthaa
oru kiruku pidikudhey
thala mela oru megam
thammuti adikudhey
kozhiya pola en urakatha nee
adi verasa muzhunguriye

Vithaaraa kalli unna
kothaaga alli vandhu
pothaana pottu chinna
nenjukulla pootta varavaa
thaniye thaniye
aruvaa mizhungum vizhiyeEnglish Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thamirabarani?

The song Thamirabarani conveys themes of longing and emotional depth, reflecting the struggles of love and heartache.

What is the plot context of Nedunchalai related to this song?

This song plays a significant role in Nedunchalai, highlighting the protagonist's emotional journey and connection to their past.

Who is the singer and music director of Thamirabarani?

The song is sung and composed by Sathya C, showcasing his unique style and emotional delivery.

When was Thamirabarani released?

Thamirabarani was released on July 7, 2013, as part of the movie Nedunchalai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thamirabarani, the protagonist reflects on lost love and the bittersweet memories that linger. The song's melancholic tone, paired with Sathya C's heartfelt rendition, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. Set against the backdrop of Nedunchalai, it beautifully encapsulates the emotional turmoil faced by the characters. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the pain of separation, making it a poignant addition to Tamil cinema's musical landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thamirabarani from Nedunchalai is a soulful melody that captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With Sathya C's emotive vocals and Karthik Netha's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced heartache. Dive into the rich musical landscape crafted by Sathya C, making this track a must-listen for Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I have come to the Thamirabarani river, like a dream that has come true. With a thousand visions, I have let go of my worries and come here. Like a dark cloud, I have come to this place, and I wonder why my heart feels heavy, like a burden on my mind.
I have seen two people and found my way. If they leave, I will be left behind.
I have only one drink left, and I have enjoyed it. If they laugh and leave, I will be left with nothing.
My heart is restless like a wandering spirit. It is beautiful, but it is consuming my life. Like a nightingale, it has rolled away from me.
Like a fruit that has fallen from the tree, I am left to eat my own flesh.
I will give you my heart, my dear, and my love.
In her heart, you are the one. If you look at me, I will become a treasure in your heart. If I see you, I will be filled with joy, like a cloud that brings rain.
You have come here to take away my heart, and I wonder if you will plant it in your own heart. Will you keep it safe, or will it be lost?
